tools.name: ping
tools.description: Server connectivity test. Returns engine version and status.

tools.name: risk_assessment
tools.description:
Full 7-signal risk report for a stablecoin.
Args:
    symbol: Token symbol (e.g. USDC, USDT, DAI)
    chain: Chain filter or aggregate (default: aggregate)
    use_case: Context for hint generation (settlement, collateral, treasury, payment)
Returns: Complete risk assessment with score, verdict, sig

tools.name: peg_status
tools.description: Quick peg check for a stablecoin. Shows current price and deviation.

tools.name: peg_history
tools.description: 30-day peg history. Shows max deviation, depeg events, trend.

tools.name: supply_flow
tools.description: Mint/burn flow analysis. Shows 7d supply changes and direction.

tools.name: holder_data
tools.description: Holder concentration metrics. Top holder %, HHI index, whale count.

tools.name: custody_data
tools.description: Custodian profile. Shows custodians, SIFI status, attestation freshness.

tools.name: redemption_data
tools.description: Redemption terms. Settlement time, minimums, fees, institutional restrictions.

tools.name: cross_chain_data
tools.description: Cross-chain distribution. Chain count, bridge exposure, primary chain.

tools.name: leaderboard
tools.description:
Stablecoin risk leaderboard. Ranked by risk score (lowest = safest).
Args:
    limit: Number of results (default 10, max 20)

tools.name: compare
tools.description:
Side-by-side comparison of up to 5 stablecoins.
Args:
    symbols: Comma-separated string (e.g. USDC,USDT,DAI) or list of symbols
    use_case: Context (settlement, collateral, treasury, payment)

tools.name: supported_tokens
tools.description: List all supported stablecoins with coverage info.

tools.name: methodology
tools.description: Explain scoring methodology. Signal weights, verdict thresholds, data sources.
